- 1997 USA Outdoor Championships in Indianapolis (100 m hurdles)
- 1998 USA Indoor Championships (60 m hurdles)
- 2002 USA Indoor Championships (60 m hurdles)
This totals 3 competitions where the athlete placed first. Therefore, the Prediction Answer of 3 is correct.
